problem id: a1a61c77
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6)

examples:
  00010100 -> 00000101
  10011101 -> 01100111
  00111011 -> 11001110
  01111100 -> 00011111
  11111111 -> 11111111
  11100011 -> 11111000
  10101010 -> 10101010
  00011001 -> 01000110

query: 01111111
predicted answer: 11011111
